reason: Backend checklist for shared core logic and Docker runtime changes.
Defines core/docker boundaries and the row-level backpack status plus expiring gift budget contract.
Gift sending and Douyu API failures must preserve explicit error semantics.
Release flow logs must remain useful without exposing secrets or changing log structure.
Implementation must follow project TypeScript quality and Docker build expectations.
Current WebUI changes belong in Docker html.ts and must not reintroduce legacy frontend paths.
The task changes selection defaults and should reuse existing allocation/helpers instead of duplicating logic.
Selection changes flow through core jobs, Docker status data, and WebUI display.
